languages.text: "Мы хранили память о вас веками. Пели песни о подвигах полка под вашим командованием".

traits.locale_text: "Мы хранили память о вас веками. Пели песни о подвигах полка под вашим командованием".

languages.text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."
languages.original_text: "Мы хранили память о вас веками. Пели песни о подвигах полка под вашим командованием".

traits.locale_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."
"We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."
"We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."
"We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

languages.text: "Wir haben die Erinnerung an Euch über Jahrhunderte gewahrt. Wir haben die Taten des Regiments unter Eurem Kommando besungen."
languages.original_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben die Erinnerung an Euch über Jahrhunderte gewahrt. Wir haben die Taten des Regiments unter Eurem Kommando besungen."

languages.text: « Nous entretenons votre souvenir depuis des siècles. Nous entonnions régulièrement des chants évoquant les exploits des troupes sous votre commandement. »
languages.original_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

traits.locale_text: « Nous entretenons votre souvenir depuis des siècles. Nous entonnions régulièrement des chants évoquant les exploits des troupes sous votre commandement. »

languages.text: «Durante siglos, hemos preservado su recuerdo, cantando sobre las hazañas del regimiento bajo su mando».
languages.original_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

traits.locale_text: «Durante siglos, hemos preservado su recuerdo, cantando sobre las hazañas del regimiento bajo su mando».

languages.text: "Sizin hatıranızı yüzyıllar boyunca koruduk. Sizin komutanız altında alayın kahramanlıklarını anlatan şarkılar söyledik."
languages.original_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

traits.locale_text: "Sizin hatıranızı yüzyıllar boyunca koruduk. Sizin komutanız altında alayın kahramanlıklarını anlatan şarkılar söyledik."

languages.text: “几百年来，我们一直铭记着您。我们传唱歌谣，赞颂本军团在您麾下的功绩。”
languages.original_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

traits.locale_text: “几百年来，我们一直铭记着您。我们传唱歌谣，赞颂本军团在您麾下的功绩。”

languages.text: 「あなたを数世紀にわたって記憶してきました。あなたの指揮の下で、連隊の功績を歌いました。」
languages.original_text: "We have preserved the memory of you for centuries. We sang songs of the regiment's deeds under your command."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたを数世紀にわたって記憶してきました。あなたの指揮の下で、連隊の功績を歌いました。」
